title: Freirea floridana
intro: Freirea floridana, also known as African plum or bush mango, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its edible fruit and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Freirea floridana include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. The most common herbal preparations made from Freirea floridana include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and digestive problems.
